rationale: Section 49.260 governs total tax base consolidation mechanics for school districts. It does not reference or depend on the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). The exemption increase affects taxable values generally but creates no direct conflict.
quote: the joint board may issue bonds and levy, pledge, and collect ad valorem taxes sufficient to pay the principal of and interest on those bonds
_note: No direct conflict. The statute operates independently of the specific homestead exemption dollar amount.
